adaptationSpending.note: UK government annual spending on climate adaptation (£ billions)

floodInsurancePayouts.note: Annual flood insurance claims payouts (£ billions), UK

uninsuredFloodHomes.note: Estimated uninsured households in flood risk zones (millions)

sources.name: Climate Change Committee
sources.dataset: UK Climate Risk Assessment 2022 and adaptation spending analysis

sources.name: Association of British Insurers
sources.dataset: Flood claims data — annual weather claims statistics

sources.name: Environment Agency
sources.dataset: Long-term flood risk — number of properties at risk

metadata.methodology: Government adaptation spending estimated from HM Treasury public spending data across Environment Agency flood defence, DESNZ adaptation programmes, and MHCLG planning adaptation. Flood insurance payouts from ABI annual weather claims statistics. Uninsured flood risk households estimated from Environment Agency flood risk maps minus Flood Re scheme coverage.
knownIssues: Government adaptation spending figures are estimates — no single consolidated adaptation budget exists
£78 billion annual requirement is a modelled projection at 2°C warming, from CCC CCRA3
Uninsured household figures based on modelled flood risk maps which may undercount actual risk
